calibration_decision.chosen: pooled g2+m3b_target+m3b_sensor kept points (n=19, slope=58.12±1.33, r=0.9956, rmse=1.78cm)
calibration_decision.rationale: g2-only kept n=4 (SE ±3.48, mid-band drift audit dropped 6/10); pooling justified by m3b_mover_effect_null PASS (all three sweeps measure the same line); instrumentation choice, not a criterion change

g1_physics_sanity.note: SNR rising with distance (31.9->82.3) is a denominator (session-noise) effect; detection itself physical -- with_peak tracks the ranging line, without_peak flat at background
